name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle skills. Hosts rabbit-spec-create (drafts initial spec bodies via the read-only rabbit-spec-creator subagent) and rabbit-spec-update (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.7.0 -> 1.8.0): issue #399 Phase 2b — rabbit-spec's own doc artifacts moved from specs/ to the flat docs/ layout (docs/spec.md, docs/contract.md, docs/CHANGELOG.md); the now-empty specs/ dir and root CHANGELOG.md were removed. Inv 6 self-reference and the Surface/Tests sections updated to the flat docs/ layout. Skill/agent dual-read behavior unchanged (coexistence window still open).
